prompt:
Using the attached design reference, produce a CLEAN BACKGROUND ART PLATE version of the exact same photograph.

REMOVE every WEB UX element layered on top of the photograph:
- the 'PERSEID ECHO CREATIONS' wordmark at the top-left
- the nav items 'APPROACH SERVICES ABOUT CONTACT' at the top-right
- the entire stacked headline 'Built. Not pitched. Not promised.'
- the persimmon orange underline beneath the headline
- the meta line 'AN AI SOLUTIONS PRACTICE / EST. 2026'
- the ghost 'Start a Conversation' button at the lower-right
- the bottom-left index marker 'INDEX / 01 / PRACTICE'
- any other web text, button, line, or chrome

KEEP, EXACTLY AS THEY ARE, every photographic element of the scene:
- the three vertical columns of small pinned printed tickets on the deep navy plaster wall
- the handwritten text on each ticket (INTAKE / TRIAGE / AGENT / REVIEW / OUTPUT) and the timestamps beneath
- the brass thumbtacks pinning each ticket
- the single warm desk lamp from camera-right throwing a warm pool of light on the lower portion of the wall
- the warm chiaroscuro shadow falloff into deep navy upper wall
- the low stool with the ceramic mug of cold coffee and the closed leather notebook
- the slight aged texture and ink ageing on the paper cards
- the lighting (single warm tungsten lamp), camera angle, depth of field, film grain, color grade, aspect ratio, and slight upper-right vignette

The output must look like the empty stage the original UX was sitting on - the photograph taken BEFORE any web text was placed over it. The handwritten labels on the pinned tickets are PART OF THE PHOTOGRAPH and must stay.

FORBID: any web/UI text anywhere in the image (wordmark, nav, headline, meta, button, index), any logo, any UI overlay, any persimmon orange or chromatic UI accent, any added object, any added person.
